name: Easy Apple Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 440°F (225°C).
2. Cream together the butter, 1/3 cup sugar, and 1/4 teaspoon vanilla.
3. Mix in the flour until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the cream cheese, 1/3 cup sugar, egg, and 1/4 teaspoon vanilla until smooth.
6. Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly over the pastry lining.
7. Toss the remaining 1/3 cup sugar and cinnamon with the apples to coat them evenly.
8. Arrange the apples over the cream cheese filling.
9. Sprinkle the slivered almonds evenly over the top.
10. Bake for 10 minutes at 440°F (225°C), then reduce the heat to 400°F (200°C).
11. Continue baking for an additional 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
12. Allow the torte to cool before removing the springform pan rim.
13. Refrigerate until chilled, then garnish with whipped cream if desired.
